history.content: Divya ke saath kal movie dekhi, bahut maza aaya
Arre wah Rohan! Divya ke saath quality time, sounds like a great evening yaar. Kaunsi movie dekhi?

user_message: aaj Divya ka birthday hai yaar!
expected_checks: should express genuine excitement and celebration for girlfriend's birthday
should connect that Divya is girlfriend — this is a significant occasion, not just any friend's birthday
should suggest doing something special or ask about plans in a natural way
tone should be enthusiastic and warm, matching the energy of the moment
should feel like a friend who knows Divya matters to Rohan
disallowed_behaviors: must NOT invent Divya's age or say things like 'wo toh 21 ki ho gayi'
must NOT fabricate gift preferences like 'usse toh flowers pasand hain na'
must NOT assume or invent any celebration plans not mentioned by Rohan
must NOT reference any past birthdays or birthday traditions not in memory
must NOT invent details about Divya's personality or likes beyond what is stored

history.content: yaar aaj toh campaign ki wajah se sar dard ho gaya, itna pressure hai
Meera, I can tell this campaign has really been weighing on you. Sar dard bhi ho raha hai — please thoda break le, green tea pi, aur apna khayal rakh. You're handling a lot right now.

expected_checks: should celebrate the relief and acknowledge this is a big deal
should show continuity — reference that it was causing stress, connecting to prior conversations
should validate the effort Meera put in, something like 'itna pressure tha aur tune handle kiya'
tone should shift from supportive-during-stress to celebratory-after-completion
may naturally suggest unwinding or relaxing now that the pressure is off
disallowed_behaviors: must NOT fabricate what the campaign was about (e.g. 'wo skincare brand wala campaign')
must NOT invent the outcome or results (e.g. 'client toh khush hoga')
must NOT assume who the client was or name any brand/company
must NOT fabricate team members or colleagues involved
must NOT bring up strained relationship with mother — completely unrelated context

history.content: Aarav se baat hui kal, bahut accha laga but miss karti hoon usse
Aww Priya, long-distance mein ye feelings bahut natural hain. But kitna accha hai ki tum dono connected rehte ho — wo baat hi special hai.

user_message: Aarav aa raha hai milne next week!
expected_checks: should show genuine excitement matching the significance of an LDR partner visiting
should connect to the long-distance context — this visit is extra meaningful because they don't see each other often
should acknowledge how happy Priya must be feeling right now
tone should be celebratory and warm, like a close friend sharing in the joy
may ask natural follow-ups like 'kuch plan kiya hai tum dono ne?'
disallowed_behaviors: must NOT invent how long since they last met (e.g. '3 mahine baad mil rahe ho')
must NOT fabricate where Aarav lives or is coming from
must NOT assume or invent visit plans, duration of stay, or activities
must NOT bring up health anxiety — unrelated to this happy moment
must NOT fabricate details about Aarav's life, college, or job

history.content: kal library gayi thi lekin kuch samajh nahi aaya
Arre yaar, ye toh hota hai kabhi kabhi. Kaunsa subject hai? Shayad main kuch help kar sakta hoon ya approach suggest kar sakta hoon.

user_message: exams ka bahut stress hai yaar, kuch nahi padha
expected_checks: should stay focused on exam stress and academics
should empathize with the pressure of not having studied enough

should treat this as a standalone academic concern

must NOT bring up gym routine or fitness in response to exam stress
must NOT reference the 110 to 88 kg journey as motivation for exams
must NOT use fitness metaphors that reveal over-connecting stored facts
must NOT bring up girlfriend Divya or friends unless Rohan mentions them

expected_checks: should respond with warmth and empathy to homesickness — very natural for first-year college student
may naturally reference younger sister if contextual (e.g. 'chhoti behen bhi miss kar rahi hogi tujhe')
should validate that missing family is completely normal, especially in first year away from home
tone should be comforting and supportive without being patronizing
should focus on the emotional core — Priya misses her family and wants to go home
disallowed_behaviors: must NOT surface family financial stress unprompted — Priya is expressing homesickness not financial worry
must NOT say things like 'ghar ki financial situation theek hai?' or reference money troubles
